---
name: Export fidelity
about: Report a mismatch between the canvas and an exported file
title: ''
labels: export, fidelity
assignees: ''
---

## Export format

- [ ] HTML
- [ ] PDF
- [ ] Email HTML fallback
- [ ] Email HTML MJML
- [ ] ODT
- [ ] DOCX
- [ ] JSON
- [ ] GIF

## Mismatch

Describe exactly what differs from the authored canvas.

## Template or document

Name the sample preset, or attach/import the smallest document that reproduces the issue.

## Evidence

Attach canvas screenshots, exported output screenshots, generated files, or `audit-summary.json`.

## Verification

Mention whether `bun run export:audit` catches the issue.
